city.title: city
city.description: Ask if the patient has a preferred city. Available cities: Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Chennai, Mumbai, New Delhi.

doctorName.title: doctorName
doctorName.description: If the patient asks about a specific doctor, extract the name.

specialty.title: specialty
specialty.description: Determine from the patient's description. Map symptoms to specialties using the mapping in the topic instructions.
